title: bartlettina ruae
intro: Bartlettina ruae, also known as Prenola or Bartlettina ruae, is a plant species within the family of Asteraceae, specifically native to Mexico and Central America. It is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Bartlettina ruae include its potential to alleviate pain and reduce inflammation, making it a sought-after remedy for various ailments. Bartlettina ruae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal compounds to be absorbed and utilized by the body.
